content_blocks.text:
## 6. AML/CFT/CPF Policies and Procedures

### 6.1 Statutory Basis

In accordance with Rule 9(14)(ii) and (iii) of the PML Rules and Paragraph 3.4.1 of the 2026 FIU-IND Guidelines, the Company shall formulate and implement AML/CFT/CPF policies and procedures (collectively, this Policy) to combat money laundering, terrorist financing, proliferation financing, and other related serious crimes.

In accordance with Rule 7(3) of the PML Rules, the Company shall evolve an internal mechanism to detect transactions specified under Rule 3 of the PML Rules and to furnish information about such transactions to FIU-IND.

### 6.2 Duty of Observance

In accordance with Paragraph 3.4.2 of the 2026 Guidelines, it shall be the duty of the Company, its Designated Director, officers, and employees to observe the procedure and the manner of furnishing information under Rule 5 and Rule 7 of the PML Rules.
